name: Rhubarb Chutney
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons apple juice (for frozen rhubarb use only)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 quart microwave-safe bowl, combine onion, garlic, and apple juice.
2. Cover the bowl and microwave until onions are crisp-tender (about 2-2 1/2 minutes).
3. Add the rest of the ingredients and mix well.
4. Cover and microwave on high for 5-5 1/2 minutes until tender, stirring once.
